---
title: "Home"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/particles.js/2.0.0/particles.min.js"></script>

<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; }

body {
  margin: 0;
  background-color: #0d0d0d;
  color: #e8e8e8;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
}

#particles-js {
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  z-index: -1;
}

.topnav {
  background-color: #c8102e;
  padding: 1.2rem 2.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.topnav .nav-left {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.topnav .brand {
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: white;
  margin-right: 1rem;
}

.topnav a {
  color: white;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.topnav a.active {
  border-bottom: 2px solid white;
  padding-bottom: 4px;
}

.topnav .social-icons {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.2rem;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
}

.topnav .social-icons a {
  color: white;
}

.hero {
  display: flex;
  gap: 4rem;
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 5rem auto;
  padding: 0 2rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
}

.hero-left {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.profile-photo {
  width: 280px;
  height: 320px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.hero-left h1 {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-align: center;
}

.hero-right {
  border-left: 1px solid #444;
  padding-left: 3rem;
}

.hero-right p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.hero-right strong {
  color: #fff;
}

.hero-right a {
  color: #6ab7ff;
  text-decoration: none;
}
</style>

<div id="particles-js"></div>

<nav class="topnav">
  <div class="nav-left">
    <span class="brand">Mejan Rahman</span>
    <a href="index.html" class="active">Home</a>
    <a href="about.html">About</a>
    <a href="research.html">Research</a>
    <a href="publications.html">Publications</a>
  </div>
  <div class="social-icons">
    <a href="mailto:meja7831@vandals.uidaho.edu"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i></a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-mejanur-rahman-mejan-389b5421b" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/mmijan02" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></a>
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <img src="Mejan picccc.jpg" alt="Md Mejanur Rahman Mejan" class="profile-photo">
    <h1>Md Mejanur Rahman Mejan</h1>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <p>I am a <strong>Political Science and International Studies undergraduate</strong> at the <a href="https://www.uidaho.edu" target="_blank">University of Idaho</a>, with research interests spanning political behavior, public opinion, electoral legitimacy, comparative politics, public policy, and human rights.</p>
    <p>My work bridges <strong>quantitative and qualitative research</strong>, including survey design, data management, and academic writing. I currently serve as a <strong>Research Assistant</strong> in the Department of Political Science and a <strong>Research Trainee</strong> at the Institute for Health in the Human Ecosystem (IHHE), where I study disease ecology, public health risk, and environmental health.</p>
    <p>I am skilled in <strong>R, Python, LaTeX, Overleaf</strong>, and Excel, with experience in statistical modeling, regression analysis, and data visualization.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
particlesJS('particles-js', {
  particles: {
    number: { value: 50 },
    color: { value: "#c8102e" },
    shape: { type: "circle" },
    opacity: { value: 0.5 },
    size: { value: 3 },
    line_linked: { enable: true, distance: 150, color: "#444", opacity: 0.4, width: 1 },
    move: { enable: true, speed: 1 }
  },
  interactivity: {
    events: { onhover: { enable: true, mode: "grab" } }
  }
});
</script>
